channel.title: 中国日报-图片
channel.description: 中国日报-图片 RSS Feed

item.title: Fashion queen Angelababy releases fashion photos
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Fashion queen Angelababy releases fashion photos

item.title: Hong Kong actor Shawn Yue announces surprise wedding
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Hong Kong actor and singer Shawn Yue shared a photo from his wedding ceremony on the social media platform Instagram and officially tied the knot Dec 5, 2017.

item.title: 2017 German Charity Christmas Bazaar delights Beijing
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: 2017 German Charity Christmas Bazaar delights Beijing

item.title: Christmas decorations illuminate Beijing
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: As our calendar is flipped close to the last page, we can catch the scent of the end of the year. But one mood booster is that Christmas is around the corner, and though it is originally a Western festival, its allure still ripples throughout the world.

item.title: Eight stars dazzle in Vogue's last issue for 2017
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Eight stars dazzle in Vogueâs last issue for 2017

item.title: Highlights of 2017 British Fashion Awards
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Highlights of 2017 British Fashion Awards

item.title: 4th Silk Road International Film Festival concludes in Fujian
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Chinese actor Jacky Chan attends the closing ceremony of the 4th Silk Road International Film Festival in Fuzhou city, East China's Fujian province, Dec 3, 2017.

item.title: Chinese stars delight the 2017 Tencent Video Star Awards
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Chinese stars delight the 2017 Tencent Video Star Awards

item.title: Fashion icon Liu Yifei poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Fashion icon Liu Yifei poses for fashion magazine

item.title: Record number of Chinese models join Shanghai lingerie extravaganza Victoria's Secret fashion show
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: A record number of seven Chinese models took to the runway during the Victoria's Secret Fashion Show at the Mercedes-Benz Arena in Shanghai on Nov 20.

item.title: Night views of Harbin through the lens
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Yang Xiangming, 22, has taken more than 6,000 photos of the night scenes in Harbin, capital of Heilongjiang province in the past two months.

item.title: Tibetans take train home after pilgrimage or travelling
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Tibetans from Qinghai and Gansu provinces took train home after their journey of pilgrimage or travelling.

item.title: Chinese stars shine at the&nbsp;2017&nbsp;L'officiel Fashion Night
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Chinese actress Liu Yifei poses as she arrives at the red carpet for the L'officiel Fashion Night 2017 in Beijing, China, Nov 29, 2017.

item.title: Yoga enthusiasts practice on frozen river in Heilongjiang
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: The temperature recently dropped to as low as -35 C in Huma county, Daxinganling region of Heilongjiang province.

item.title: Online celebrity&nbsp;animals of 2017
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: This hilarious image shows red squirrels displaying their musical skills on mini musical instruments. The critters looked like they could be driving their woodland neighbors nuts with violins, guitars, saxophones and even a little drum kit.

item.title: Wingsuit flyers fly into plane from Jungfrau Mountain
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: French duo had 2.45 minutes and a free fall distance of 3200 meters to complete their project "Door In The Sky", coordinated by Yves Rossy know as the "Jetman".

item.title: Actress Zhang Tianai poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Actress Zhang Tianai poses for fashion magazine.

item.title: World's largest shaftless Ferris wheel built in China
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: World's largest Ferris wheel without center shaft is under construction in Weifang, East China's Shandong province.

item.title: Fashion trend: Learn from&nbsp;female celebrities with bold red lips
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: There's a saying going around fashion circles: âEverything can be solved by a lipstick; if it still doesnât work well, then you should use two.â

item.title: Li Yifeng and Ju Xiaowen pose for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Li Yifeng and Ju Xiaowen pose for fashion magazine

item.title: Four Victoria's Secret angels spotted in fashion party
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Four Victoria's Secret angels spotted in fashion party

item.title: Ancient cities to be connected by Xi'an-Chengdu high-speed railway
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: The Xi'an-Chengdu high-speed railway, China's first rail route to run through the Qinling Mountains, is scheduled to enter operation within the year. By then, several ancient cities and tourist attractions will be connected by the railway.

item.title: Snow turns Harbin into winter wonderland
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: The iconic Saint Sophia Cathedral in Harbin, Northeast China's Heilongjiang province, is filled with visitors during a heavy snowfall, Nov 28, 2017.

item.title: Fashion design in Mongolian style
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: The 14th Mongolian Costume Arts Festival kicked off in Hohhot, North China's Inner Mongolia autonomous region, on Nov 27.

item.title: Actress Ni Ni releases fashin photos
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Actress Ni Ni releases fashin photos

item.title: Highest Paid Models of 2017 includes Chinese model Liu Wen
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: In the latest release of the Worldâs Highest Paid Models of 2017 by Forbes, an American business magazine well-known for its lists and rankings, Chinese model Liu Wen remains at the No. 8 position with an amazing income of $6.5 million.

item.title: Zhou Xun and Hu Ge pose for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Zhou Xun and Hu Ge pose for fashion magazine.

item.title: Reed Catkin Festival held in Wuhan
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: The start of the Reed Catkin Festival in Wuhan, Hubei province, on Nov 26, 2017.

item.title: Is it a building or a bookshelf?
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: A building designed like a bookshelf is seen in Haining, Zhejiang province, on Nov 25, 2017.

item.title: Actress Gulnezer Bextiyar poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Actress Gulnezer Bextiyar poses for fashion magazine

item.title: Actress Michelle Chen poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Actress Michelle Chen poses for fashion magazine

item.title: 54th Golden Horse Awards concludes in Taipei
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Chinese actor Tu Men kisses actress Kara Wai's hand with their awards for media for Best Leading Actor and Actress respectively at the 54th Golden Horse Awards in Taipei city, China, Nov 25, 2017. The Golden Horse awards are the Chinese-language film industry's biggest annual events.

item.title: First flight
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Liu and other flight attendants from the island had just completed three months of training as part of an employment program for youth.

item.title: Futurist library draws readers, and also visitors
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Tianjin Binhai New Area Library, which features terraced shelves and cascading ceiling-to-floor bookcases, is drawing many visitors as well as readers.

item.title: 2017 Miss Chinese Toronto Pageant final in Toronto
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Tiffany Choi, 23 years old, was crowned the 2017 Miss Chinese Toronto on Friday.

item.title: Scenery of Three Gorges in Central China
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Photo taken on Nov 25, 2017 shows scenery at Xiling Gorge of the Three Gorges in Central China's Hubei province.

item.title: US man building mud house in rural China
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: A 42-year-old man from US, whose Chinese name is Li Jie, is living an idyllic life in Yunqiu Mountain in Linfen of Shanxi province.

item.title: Actors delight 2017 Esquire annual ceremony
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Actors delight 2017 Esquire annual ceremony

item.title: 2017 Shanghai Haute Couture Week: Grace Chen
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: A model displays a new creation at the fashion show of Grace Chen during the 2017 Shanghai Haute Couture Week in Shanghai, China, November 22, 2017.

item.title: Pop star Dilraba Dilmurat poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Pop star Dilraba Dilmurat poses for fashion magazine

item.title: Traditional dragon dance appeals to students
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Zhejiang University in East China's Zhejiang province introduced dragon dance and lion dance, two traditional Chinese performances staged during festivals, as a physical education course in September.

item.title: Iconic moments from Victoria's Secret Fashion Show
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: The annual Victoria's Secret Fashion show has just concluded this month. As usual, it has generated animated discussions on social media platforms at home and abroad.

item.title: Top actress Zhou Xun poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Top actress Zhou Xun poses for fashion magazine

item.title: Xi'an-Chengdu high-speed railway enters test run
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: The first full-course test run was carried out Wednesday on a high-speed railway linking Xi'an with Chengdu, which is scheduled to enter operation within the year.

item.title: Actress Jing Tian poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Actress Jing Tian poses for fashion magazine

item.title: Exercises to stay energetic in winter
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: As it becomes increasingly colder, people can do various exercises to stay energetic. The variety of exercises students do during their class break may go beyond your imagination.

item.title: Fashion queen Angelababy releases fashion photos
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Fashion queen Angelababy releases fashion photos

item.title: Chinese FM calls for jointly building new type of Asia-Europe partnership
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi on Monday called for jointly building a new type of Asia-Europe partnership at the 13th foreign ministers' meeting of the Asia-Europe Meeting (ASEM) in the Myanmar capital.

item.title: World Children's Day marked in Geneva
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: More than 200 children and young people on Monday "took over" the Palais des Nations in Geneva, the UN's Geneva Headquarters, to mark the World Children's Day which falls on Nov 20.

item.title: Beautiful ice cubes seen in Harbin
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: With the sudden drop in temperature in Harbin, the capital of Northeast China's Heilongjiang province, people can appreciate a large ice floe by the riverside of the Songhua River.

item.title: Comfortable chic in cold: White puffer coats
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: A warm puffer coat is what everyone needs to ward off the chilly winds as temperatures drop to below zero. But the question is: how to keep warm but stay slender and chic at the same time in the gloomy winter days? The color of white is a solution.

item.title: Model He Sui poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Model He Sui poses for fashion magazine

item.title: The world in photos: Nov 13-19
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Here, we present some of the most striking images around the world this past week.

item.title: Scenery of terraced fields in South China's Guangxi
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Photo taken on Nov 17, 2017 shows terraced fields in Longji township of Longsheng county, South China's Guangxi Zhuang autonomous region.

item.title: Stefanie Sun releases new MV
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Stefanie Sun releases new MV

item.title: Taiyuan Zoo sets up 'white tiger kindergarten'
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: This year, Taiyuan Zoo in Shanxi province prepared for a white tiger breeding peak.

item.title: All-apple feast
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: A Chinese cooking master innovates dishes by steaming, boiling, frying apples in Dalian, NE China's Liaoning province. It is the harvest time of apples in the region.

item.title: Fashion icon Yang Mi poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Fashion icon Yang Mi poses for fashion magazine

item.title: Pyeongchang Winter Olympics torch relay kicks off
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: The Olympic flame arrived in Incheon, South Korea, on November 1 and the relay across South Korea will cover 2,018 kilometers before reaching the main venue for the opening ceremony of the Games after 100 days.

item.title: Cute cats pose like Chinese kung fu fighters
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: talented photographer Hisakata Hiroyuki has managed to snap a group of Mortal Tom cats in a variety of high-flying kung fu poses. Using his own rapid-fire reactions, Hiroyuki has captured the lovable cats flying through the air, their legs and paws outstretched like something out of an action movie.

item.title: Exploring Sanjiangyuan National Park in wintertime
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Sanjiangyuan National Park is already coated in snow. The frozen lake lies at the foot of the mountain, glittering on the white plateau.

item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Angelababy releases fashion photos

item.description: Pop star Dilraba Dilmurat poses for fashion magazine

item.title: Honrn's spring/summer collection released in Beijing
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Chinese fashion company Honrn released its 2018 spring/summer collection at a runway show during China Fashion Week in Beijing last week.

item.title: A new 'Shangri-La' in Ma Yanli's runway show
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Model-turned designer Ma Yanli held a runway show last week in Beijing to release her latest haute couture collection for 2018 spring/summer.

item.title: Scenery of snow-covered Yading Nature Reserve in SW China
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Photos show the scenery in Yading Nature Reserve in Daocheng county of Tibetan autonomous prefecture of Garze, Southwest China's Sichuan province.

item.title: Hollywood and China see a future for co-productions
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: In response to the agreement between China and the United States to encourage cross-cultural, people-to-people exchanges, U.S. and Chinese filmmakers are gearing up to jump into the fray.

item.title: The world in photos: Nov 6-12
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Here, we present some of the most striking images around the world this past week.

item.title: 2017 Fall/Winter fashion trend: Paolo Sebastian dressing style
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: A model showcases a design on the runway at the fashion show of Paolo Sebastian during the 2017 Paris Haute Couture Fashion Week.

item.title: Liu Yifei promotes new film
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Actress Liu Yifei arrives in Hangzhou, capital of North China's Zhejiang province, Nov 11, 2017, for the publicity of the new film Rescuing Flying Tiger.

item.title: Kiss me little, kiss me long
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Like a lover, a lipstick should never leave you â until you decide to remove it.

item.title: Highlights of 2018 Chanel resort collection fashion show
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: A model displays a new creation during the 2018 Chanel resort collection fashion show in Chengdu city, Southwest China's Sichuan province, November 7, 2017.

item.title: Rare jade and agate now on show
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: A collection of rare jade and agate is on show at the 2017 International Jewelry Exhibition in Beijing through Nov 13.

item.title: 2017 China Fashion Week:Ground Show
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: A model showcases a design on the runway at the Ground Show night fashion show during the China Fashion Week Spring/Summer 2018 at the Beijing Hotel on November 7, 2017, Beijing, China.

item.title: 2017 China Fashion Week: Hu Sheguang
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: A model displays a new creation at the fashion show of Hu Sheguang during the China Fashion Week Spring/Summer 2018 in Beijing, China, November 7, 2017.

item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Model He Sui releases fashion photos.

item.title: Teen actor-singer Wang Yuan poses for the fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Teen actor-singer Wang Yuan poses for the fashion magazine

item.title: Celebrities delight 2018 Chanel resort collection fashion show
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Ma Sichun, Liu Haoran, Zhang Yu, CEO of the fashion magazine Vogue China, Zhou Xun and Xin Zhilei take a photo at the 2018 Chanel resort collection fashion show in Chengdu city, Southwest China's Sichuan province, November 7, 2017.

item.title: Captive panda population reaches 520 worldwide
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: The population of captive giant pandas has reached 520 worldwide, according to the China giant panda breeding technology committee at its annual conference Tuesday.

item.title: Full empowderment for an impeccable porcelain complexion
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: The century-old French cosmetics and perfume house Caron opens its doors to China Daily Lifestyle Premium for an exclusive visit. Enter the magic world of powder and get an impeccable porcelain complexion.

item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: A model displays a new creation at the fashion show of Rongchang grass clothing by Zhang Yichao during the China Fashion Week Spring/Summer 2018 in Beijing, China, November 6, 2017.

item.description: A model displays a new creation at the fashion show of Minichoc during the China Fashion Week Spring/Summer 2018 in Beijing, China, November 5, 2017.

item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: A model displays a new creation at the fashion show of Fashion Union by Shang Kunyuan during the China Fashion Week Spring/Summer 2018 in Beijing, China, November 3, 2017.

item.title: 2017 China Fashion Week: Jusere
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: A model displays a new creation at the fashion show of Jusere by Yu Aiping during the China Fashion Week Spring/Summer 2018 in Beijing, China, Nov 3, 2017.

item.title: 2018 Spring/Summer fashion trend: Bright-colored eyeshadow
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Believe it or not, eyeshadow really makes sense in a daily facial makeup regimen. But it can either add charisma to the eye or turn you into a fashion disaster.

item.title: Autumn wonders around China: Photos that grasp the best moments of the season
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: With its moderate temperature, away from summer heat and winter chill, autumn has always been considered the most agreeable season of the year.

item.title: 2017 China Fashion Week: Ann Eleven
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Models present creations of Ann Eleven during the China Fashion Week Spring/Summer 2018 in Beijing, China, Nov 5, 2017.

item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: A model displays a new creation at the fashion show of 95.SY by Deng Zhaoping during the China Fashion Week Spring/Summer 2018 in Beijing, China, Nov 5, 2017.

item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: A model displays a new creation at the fashion show of Maryma designed by Ma Yanli during the China Fashion Week Spring/Summer 2018 in Beijing, China, Nov 5, 2017.

item.title: Fashion icon Zhang Ziyi poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Fashion icon Zhang Ziyi poses for the fashion magazine.

item.title: For a stylish journey into the unknown
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Hop on your bike and channel your inner Steve McQueen as you get ready to hit the road â for a stylish journey into the unknown.

item.title: Time of the season
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Spring forward with an awakening and a wardrobe refresh â from fur to florals â courtesy of these five fashion houses.

item.title: Whooper swans fly to spend winter in China's Shanxi
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Whooper swans fly at the wetland of Yellow River in Pinglu county, North China's Shanxi province, Nov 2, 2017. Many whooper swans came to spend the winter time in the wetland every year.

item.description: A model displays a new creation at the fashion show of Xiang Shang Sport by Huang Jieming during the China Fashion Week Spring/Summer 2018 in Beijing, China, Nov 2, 2017.

item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: A model displays a new creation at the fashion show of Laurel during the China Fashion Week Spring/Summer 2018 in Beijing, China, Nov 2, 2017.

item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: A model displays a new creation at the fashion show of Bing Chuan by Xiong Yun during the China Fashion Week Spring/Summer 2018 in Beijing, China, Nov 2, 2017.

item.description: Chu Yan, the chief costume designer for leaders of the 2014 APEC meeting, released her new creations during the China Fashion Week in Beijing on Tuesday night.

item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Thereâs never a bad time or season to stock up on hair accessories. Theyâre small and easy to store, making them a super convenient addition to your makeup.

item.description: A model displays a new creation at the fashion show of JD Ã Bebe during the China Fashion Week Spring/Summer 2018 in Beijing, China, November 1, 2017.

item.title: Song duo ties the knot in Seoul
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: South Korean actor Song Hye Kyo and actress Song Joong Ki officially tied the knot in Seoul on October 31.

item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: A model displays a new creation at the fashion show of Idili Silk From Tianshan To The World during the China Fashion Week Spring/Summer 2018 in Beijing, China, October 30, 2017.

item.description: A model displays a new creation at the fashion show of Chu Yan during the China Fashion Week Spring/Summer 2018 in Beijing, China, October 31, 2017.

item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: A model displays a new creation at the fashion show of Creative Draping by Qiu Peina during the China Fashion Week Spring/Summer 2018 in Beijing, China, October 30, 2017.

item.title: Fog-enveloped Tianquan Lake in Jiangsu
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Boats are seen floating on the fog-enveloped Tianquan Lake in Xuyi county, East China's Jiangsu province, Oct 30, 2017.

item.title: Essence releases latest products
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Germany-based underwear brand Triumph releases its latest collection for Essence in Shanghai on Oct 30. Actress and brand ambassador Liv Tyler shared her views on fashion and modern life with other fashionistas.

item.title: Actress Liu Shishi poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Actress Liu Shishi poses for fashion magazine

item.title: 2017 China Fashion Week: Chan Zhe
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Models present creations by Chan Zhe collection during the Mercedes-Benz China Fashion Week in Beijing, China, October 30, 2017.

item.title: Pop star Dilraba Dilmurat poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Pop star Dilraba Dilmurat poses for fashion magazine

item.title: 2017 China Fashion Week: DHUB 2018 S/S
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: 2017 China Fashion Week(Spring/Summer 2018) was launched in Beijing on Oct 29. The 10-day event will hold more than 110 activities, with "DHUB 2018 S/S" design collection as its highlight.

item.title: 2018 Spring/Summer fashion trend: Puff sleeve
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Often associated with Disney princesses-style or Shakespearean heroines, wedding dresses or royal costumes, puffed sleeves have undergone many transformations in size and shape over the years.

item.title: College students wear golden clothes made of gingko leaves
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Five college students wearing golden clothes made of gingko leaves take selfies at the Baiyun Mountain in Luoyang, Henan province, on Oct 29, 2017.

item.title: 2017 China Fashion Week: E.Lau
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: A model displays a new creation at the fashion show of E. Lau during the China Fashion Week Spring/Summer 2018 collection in Beijing, China, Oct 29, 2017.

item.title: 2017 China Fashion Week: Ne Tiger
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: A dancer performs with a pipa, a Chinese traditional music instrument during the Ne Tiger haute couture 2018 collection with "The Road" theme in the opening show for the China Fashion

item.title: 20,000 people share 2,140-meter long table banquet
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: A 2,140-meter long table banquet was held in Danzhai County, Guizhou Province during the Double Ninth Festival on October 28, 2017.

item.title: Tokyo marks 1,000 days until 2020 Olympic Games
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Portable floats featuring number of 1,000 are displayed as participants attend the countdown ceremony to mark 1,000 days until the 2020 Tokyo Olympic Games in Tokyo, Japan, October 28, 2017.

item.title: Bird's-eye view of Taishan Mountain in E China
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: The Taishan Mountain was enlisted as the United Nations Educational, Scientific and Cultural Organization world Heritage in 1987. The artistic masterpieces on the mount reserve the ancient Chinese civilizations and beliefs.

item.title: 2018 Spring/Summer fashion trend: Wet hair style
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: 2018 Spring/Summer fashion trend: Wet hair style

item.title: China's naval hospital ship assists 6,000 people in Angola
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: The Chinese naval hospital ship Peace Ark At said it had consulted and treated at least 6,000 people during its eight-day stay in Angola.

item.description: Circular handbags designed by Alice + Olivia during the 2018 Spring/Summer New York Fashion Week

item.title: 2018 Spring/Summer fashion trend: Heavy metal earrings
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Believe it or not, heavy metal earrings are set to become one of the favorites in the fashion circle this year.

item.title: Scenery of Daxihaizi Reservoir on Tarim River in Xinjiang
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: The water diversion to the lower reaches of Tarim River has reached one billion cubic meters since April 27 this year, which is part of the sustained efforts of the local government to maintain the eco-environment of the Tarim valley.

item.title: 2017 Tokyo Fashion Week: Memuse
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: A model displays a new creation at the fashion show of Global Work during the Tokyo Fashion Week Spring/Summer 2018 in Tokyo, Japan, October 22, 2017.

item.title: Arch of world's longest cable-stayed bridge joined
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: The main arch of world's longest cable-stayed bridge, the Hutong Railway Yangtze River Bridge, is linked up at the section of Tiansheng Port Area on the Yangtze River in Nantong city, East China's Jiangsu province, Oct 22, 2017.

item.title: Chinese actress Li Bingbing poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-图片

item.title: Booming film industry in past five years: Fast development
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: The year 2012 is a significant time for the domestic movie market. If we have to describe the year in key words, it should be "fast development".

item.title: Unmanned boats conduct geological survey in Hainan
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: China sent two unmanned boatsï¼Jinghai 3 and Jinghaihongï¼to survey the marine geological conditions in the Dongmaozhou Island off Sanya, where surveyors failed to carry out a field survey last year after ships ran aground.

item.title: Sanlitun's light festival brings cheer to fashion hub
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Art works by light artists and art teams from across the world have turned Beijing's Sanlitun area, the city's iconic fashion hub, into a luminous world with an ongoing light festival.

item.description: A model displays new creations at the fashion show of Moto Guo during the Tokyo Fashion Week Spring/Summer 2018 in Tokyo, Japan, October 17, 2017.

item.title: Giada puts on runway show in Milan
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Models present creations from Italian brand Giada's 2018 spring-summer collection in Milan.

item.title: For a cozy autumn, consider corduroy
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: From fashion runways to corduroy-clad beauties on streets, one thing is clear this year: corduroy is trending again. Here is a collection of photos showing why you should pick a corduroy outfit for a fashionable, comfortable and cozy autumn.

item.title: Peace Bird fashions fly on runway
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Chinese menswear brand Peace Bird recently organized a runway show to celebrate its 10th anniversary in Shanghai.

item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Photos show the trees of populus euphratica in Ejin qi, North China's Inner Mongolia autonomous region.

item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Models display new creations at the fashion show of CRZ during the Shanghai Fashion Week Spring/Summer 2018 in Shanghai, China, 14 October 2017.

item.title: Fed Express eclipses his old foe Rafa again
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Swiss great earns fifth straight win over Nadal in Shanghai showdown

item.title: Women present cheongsam at Ping'an terrace field in Guangxi
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Women present cheongsam, a traditional Chinese women's dress also known as Qipao, at Ping'an terrace field in Longji town of Longsheng, South China's Guangxi Zhuang autonomous region, Oct 14, 2017.

item.title: Creations of 'MUKZIN' staged at Shanghai Fashion Week
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Models present creations of "MUKZIN" during the Shanghai Fashion Week Spring/Summer 2018 in Shanghai, East China, Oct 13, 2017.

item.title: Dormitory barber has students buzzing
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: What to do if hairdressing services are too costly? For one college student in Central China's Anqing city, the answer is to pick up the clippers himself.

item.title: Three white tiger cubs steal the show in Harbin
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Recently, three white tiger cubs drew much attention of tourists at the Siberian Tiger Park in Harbin, the capital of Heilongjiang province. The triplets, one male and two females, were born on August 17 and their parents are white Bengal tigers with gene mutation. Even though they are less than two months old, the triplets show different temperaments: the oldest one is clingy, the second one is docile and the youngest one is arrogant.

item.title: Fashion icon Yang Mi poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Fashion icon Yang Mi poses for fashion magazine

item.title: To bid, or not to bid: the Oscar race in China
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Chinese film phenomenon Wolf Warrior 2 was selected as the Chinese entry for the Best Foreign Language Film category at the 90th Academy Awards this month.

item.title: Fever for Szechuan Sauce makes Pixian bean sauce hot
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: With the Szechuan Sauce causing a craze in the US, its raw material, Pixian thick broad-bean sauce, has also become a hot item online.

item.title: With 'exotic'looks, Uygurs find opportunities in the entertainment business
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Uygur faces are finding their way to movie screens, phones, and billboards across China. Members of the ethnic minority group have facial features that Chinese brands have deemed âattractive,â creating opportunities for talented Uygurs to break into the entertainment business as singers, models and TV stars.

item.title: 2017 Shanghai fashion week: Moiselle
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: A model walks on the runway during the Moiselle show during the 2017 Shanghai fashion week on Oct 11, 2017.

item.title: Breathtaking beauty along the 'road to heaven'
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Shrouded in mist and passing through lush green fields, the Hequ-Napo Expressway in South China was hailed as the "path to heaven" by UK media outlet Mirror for the stunning scenery surrounding it.

item.title: Actress Shu Qi poses for the fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Actress Shu Qi poses for the fashion magazine.

item.title: Ghoulish picks for Halloween
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: It's the one date on the calendar when your style is allowed to be a frightful sight: October 31

item.title: Makeover with wallpaper
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Want to transform your home into a cosy space you can sink into after a hard day's work? Keep cool â and hang some gorgeous wallpaper.

item.title: Colors of autumn around China
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Autumn is a season full of colors.Nature's palette has performed its miracles and sprinkled a wide array of shades across the varied terrains of China.

item.title: Chinese sprinter Su Bingtian and wife hold wedding ceremony in hometown
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Chinese sprinter Su Bingtian and wife Lin Yanfang hold their wedding ceremony in their hometown, Guangdong's Zhongshan city, on Oct 10, 2017.

item.title: Natural power of top-notch accessories
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Whether on land or under the sea, be sure to harness the attractive, natural power of these top-notch accessories.

item.title: Baoding holds fur summit
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: The 2017 China Fur Trade Summit was recently held in Baoding, North China's Hebei province. Professionals from the fur, stock farming and fashion industries participated in the event.

item.title: Diwali in Leicester: An Indian adventure in Britain
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Fireworks fill the sky during the Diwali lights switch on in Leicester, Britain, Oct 8, 2017.

item.title: China witnesses more than 710 mln tourist trips during National Day holiday
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: China witnessed more than 710 million tourist trips during the eight-day National Day and Mid-Autumn holidays, ringing up to about 590 billion yuan ($88.68 billion) in tourism income, according to the National Tourism Administration.

item.title: Accessory-Mad Men
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Guys, don't delay â put some of the coolest rings and cufflinks on your fingers and wrists today

item.title: Sartorial souls of traditional masculinity
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Three New York-based men's fashion brands bring metro-sexy back for the new season

item.title: China enjoys festival views of moon
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Today is China's traditional Mid-Autumn Festival. The day is also known as the Moon Festival, as the moon is at its roundest and brightest at this time of year.

item.title: Hermes creations presented in Paris fashion week
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: A model presents a creation of Hermes during the fashion week for 2018 spring/summer women's collection in Paris, France, on Oct 2, 2017.

item.title: Chinese model Xi Mengyao spotted in Paris fashion week
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Chinese model Xi Menyao, better known as Ming Xi, attends a party for L'Oreal x Balmain collections during the 2017 Paris fashion week in Paris, France, September 28, 2017.

item.title: Ni Ni and Jing Boran pose for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Ni Ni and Jing Boran pose for fashion magazine

item.title: China's national parks: Natural, scenic and wild
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: China released an overall plan on the development and management of national parks to protect its natural beauty on Tuesday. The country has 10 pilot national parks, which are expected to undergo assessments in the coming years and could then be termed national parks.

item.title: Exhibition details progress of country over past 5 years
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: About 20,000 people visited an exhibition on Wednesday showcasing China's progress in the past five years under the leadership of the Communist Party of China with President Xi Jinping as the core.

item.title: China-Mongolia Expo held in Hohhot
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: The second China-Mongolia Expo is held in Hohhot, Inner Mongolia autonomous region, on Sept 26, 2017.

item.title: Li Na tastes local delicacy during WTA Wuhan Open
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Chinese two-time Grand Slam champion Li Na (R) and India's Sania Mirza (C) taking part in 2017 WTA Wuhan Open try to make traditional Wuhan food "Hot Dry Noodle" in Wuhan, capital of central China's Hubei Province, on Sept 25, 2017.

item.title: The world in photos: Sept 18-24
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Here, we present some of the most striking images around the world this past week.

item.title: Player party held for 2017 WTA Wuhan Open
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Competitors attend the player party for 2017 WTA Wuhan Open in Wuhan, capital of Central China's Hubei province, on Sept 23, 2017.

item.title: 'Comfort women' memorial unveiled in San Francisco
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: "I hate the crime, not the people," an emotional Yong-Soo Lee, a Korean woman who survived the sexual slavery by the Imperial Army of Japan during World War II, told a packed audience at a corner of a public square here.

item.title: Fashion icon Yang Mi poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Fashion icon Yang Mi poses for the fashion magazine.

item.title: 2017 Milan fashion week: Moschino
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: A model walks on the runway during the Moschino fashion show during the Milan fashion week held in Milan, Italy on September 21, 2017.

item.title: Medals for Pyeongchang 2018 Winter Olympic Games unveiled
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Medals for the Pyeongchang 2018 Winter Olympic Games are seen during its unveiling ceremony in Seoul, South Korea, Sept 21, 2017.

item.title: 2017 Milan fashion week: Gucci
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: A model walks on the runway during the Gucci fashion show during the Milan fashion week held in Milan, Italy on September 20, 2017.

item.title: Relics of the wealthy in old Shanghai now on show&nbsp;
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Artifacts from old Shanghai households are now on exhibition in POA Gallery and the Wulixiang Museum in Xintiandi, an upscale shopping and lifestyle hub of the city.

item.title: Actor-singer Huang Xiaoming poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Actor-singer Huang Xiaoming poses for fashion magazine.

item.title: 2017 Milan fashion week:Francesco Scognamiglio
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: A model walks the runway at the Francesco Scognamiglio show during Milan fashion week Spring/Summer collection on Sept 20, 2017 in Milan, Italy.

item.title: 2017 Milan fashion week: Angel Chen
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: A model walks the runway at the Angel Chen show during Milan Fashion Week Spring/Summer 2018 on September 20, 2017 in Milan, Italy.

item.title: Li Yuchun spotted in Milan fashion week
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Chinese pop star Li Yuchun takes part in the Gucci new collection show during the 2018 Spring/Summer Milan fashion week on Sept 20 in Italy.

item.title: Over 2,000 photographers attend Pingyao festival in Shanxi
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Under the theme "With Original Inspiration, For a Brighter Future", 16,000 photos are on display at the festival, which was attended by over 2,000 photographers from 23 countries and regions.

item.title: 'Starry, starry nights' over Sanqing Mountain
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Photos taken on the night of Sept 17 to early morning of Sept 18 show stars filling the night sky over Sanqing Mountain in Jiangxi province.

item.title: Models display grace of <EM>qipao</EM> in Shenyang
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Models from different countries took to the catwalk in qipao, a traditional Chinese dress, at the first Shenyang Qipao International Cultural Festival held at the Shenyang Palace Museum in Shenyang, Northwest China's Liaoning province, on Tuesday.

item.title: Scenery of Guanegou National Forest Park in China's Gansu
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Aerial photo taken on Sept 19, 2017 shows the scenery of Guanegou National Forest Park at Dangchang county in Longnan city, Northwest China's Gansu province.

item.title: Aviation Expo China opens in Beijing
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: The 17th Aviation Expo China kicked off in Beijing on Tuesday, with some 300 exhibitors from 14 countries and regions presenting their best technology and equipment.

item.title: 2017 London fashion week: Margaret Howell
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Model walks on the runway during the Margaret Howell Fashion Show during London Fashion Week Spring Summer 2018 held at Rambert 99 Upper Ground in London, England on September 17, 2017.

item.title: 2017 London fashion week: David Koma
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Model walks on the runway during the David Koma Fashion Show during London Fashion Week Spring Summer 2018 held at BFC Show Space in London, England on September 19, 2017.

item.title: Chinese actress Sun Li poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Chinese actress Sun Li poses for fashion magazine.

item.title: Students practice martial arts during class break
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: For students at the Shaqu Experimental School in Dalian, Northeast China's Liaoning province, wushu, or Chinese martial arts, has been included in the curriculum since 1996 and it gradually became a permanent fixture during the class break.

item.title: Galeries Lafayette Beijing promotes new season collection
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Galeries Lafayette Beijing held a joint fashion show with some leading brands on September 15 and 16 to kick off the autumn/winter season.

item.title: Picturesque Qishu Lake in morning light
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: The Qishu Lake at Huangshan Mountain in Anhui province is covered by a spray of mist in the autumn. As the first rays of morning sun fall on the wide lake, silver light glitters, and Qishu Lake turns colorful.

item.title: Sesame seed cake: Traditional food of Xiting in E China
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Sesame seed cakes are baked in an oven at a workshop in Xiting township of Nantong city, East China's Jiangsu province, Sept 18, 2017.

item.title: Liu Haoran and Chun Xia pose for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Liu Haoran and Chun Xia pose for fashion magazine.

item.title: 2017 London fashion week: Sophia Webster
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Shoes on display at the Sophia Webster presentation at the Portico Rooms, Somerset House on September 18, 2017 in London, England.

item.title: 2017 London fashion week: Hill and Friends
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Bags in display at the Hill and Friends presentation during London Fashion Week on September 18, 2017 in London, England.

item.title: French Ligue 1: Paris Saint Germain vs. Lyon
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Paris Saint Germain won 2-0.

item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: A model walks the runway at the Chalayan Spring Summer 2018 fashion show during London Fashion Week on September 17, 2017 in London, United Kingdom.

item.title: Love of cars translates into fashion
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Designer Ralph Lauren says his fancy cars have been an inspiration to him. Wang Linyan reports from New York.

item.title: People pay tribute to world's oldest panda
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Visitors pay tribute to Basi, the world's oldest captive panda, who died at the age of 37 â equivalent to more than 100 human years â at the Strait Panda Research and Exchange Center in Fuzhou, East China's Fujian province, Sept 16.

item.title: Love of cars translates into fashion
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Designer Ralph Lauren says his fancy cars have always been an inspiration to him.

item.title: 2017 London fashion week: Vin + Omi
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: A model walks the runway as Vin + Omi showcase their Spring/ Summer 2018 collection duirng the London fashion week on September 14, 2017 in London, England.

item.title: Special snacks displayed during 14th China-ASEAN Expo
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: The 14th China-ASEAN Expo opened here Tuesday, highlighting trade and investment among China, ASEAN and other countries along the Belt and Road.

item.title: 'China chic' at front of the fashion world
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: During the 2017 New York fashion week, China chic once again aroused attention and came to the fore of the fashion world in the autumn and winter collections of 2017.

item.title: 2017 New York fashion week: Michael Kors
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: A model walks the runway at the Michael Kors Ready to Wear Spring/Summer 2018 fashion show during New York fashion week on September 13, 2017 in New York City.

item.title: Fashion icon Yang Mi poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Fashion icon Yang Mi poses for fashion magazine

item.title: 2017 New York fashion week:Vicky Zhang
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Models walk the runway at the Vicky Zhang fashion show during New York Fashion Week: The Shows at Gallery 1, Skylight Clarkson Sq on September 13, 2017 in New York City.

item.title: 2017 New York fashion week: Marchesa
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: A model walks the runway wearing Marchesa Spring 2018 during New York Fashion Week on September 13, 2017 in New York City.

item.title: Fashion queen Angelababy poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Fashion queen Angelababy poses for fashion magazine.

item.title: Butterfly-shaped floating boardwalk to be opened in SW China
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: The boardwalk, which consists of 222,500 floating units, has five floating swimming pools and some 200 inflatable amusement equipments. It is scheduled to be opened to the public during the upcoming National Day holidays.

item.title: Actress-model Lin Chi-ling poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Actress-model Lin Chi-ling poses for the fashion magazine.

item.title: 2017 New York fashion week: Claudia Li
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: A model walks the runway for Claudia Li fashion show during New York fashion week on September 12, 2017 in New York City.

item.title: 2017 New York fashion week: Calvin Luo
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: A model walks the runway at Calvin Luo show during New York fashion week at the Whitney Museum of American Art on September 12, 2017 in New York City.

item.title: Chinese celebrities delight 2017 New York fashion week
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Chinese celebrities delight New York fashion week

item.title: US marks 9/11 anniversary with resolve, tears and hope
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Americans commemorated 9/11 on Monday with tear-streaked tributes, a presidential warning to terrorists and appeals from victims' relatives for unity and hope 16 years after the deadliest terrorist attack on US soil.

item.title: Butting heads
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: A pair of goats test their strength in Yanggu county, Shandong province on Sept 12, 2017.

item.title: Golden autumn scene in Jiangbulake scenic area
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Wheat fields at the Jiangbulake scenic bath in the morning sunlight on Sept 11. Jiangbulake in Qitai county, Xinjiang Uygur autonomous region, is now in its harvest season. Bundled grain stacks, like building blocks, are scattered all over the region.

item.title: 2017 New York fashion week: Katty Xiomara
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: A model walks the runway for Katty Xiomara fashion show during New York Fashion Week at Pier 59 on September 11, 2017 in New York City.

item.title: Scenery of Jiudian Gorge in NW China's Gansu
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Photo taken on Sept 8, 2017 shows the scenery of the Jiudian Gorge in Gannan Tibetan autonomous prefecture, Northwest China's Gansu province.

item.title: Scenery of Qianyang ancient town in Hunan
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: With a history of more than two thousand years, most of the architectures are made of wood, and many people are still live in the area.

item.title: 2017 New York fashion week:Derek Lam
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: A model walks the runway for Derek Lam collection during New York fashion week on September 11, 2017 in New York City.

item.title: Pop idol Angelababy poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Pop idol Angelababy poses for fashion magazine.

item.title: Former teenage 'it girl' all grown up
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Alexa Chung began her career as a teenage model. She's now 33, with a brand of her own and numerous other claims to fame â but her most prestigious title remains "It girl".

item.title: 2017 New York fashion week: Just In Case
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: A model walks the runway for Just In Case fashion show at the Dream Downtown Hotel on September 10, 2017 in New York City.

item.title: Chic, cool and womanly, kimono is key to femininity
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: It's a constant inspiration for fashion designers: the kimono. From the traditional Japanese garment to the effortlessly chic cool-girl pyjamas of today, wearing a kimono proves that, with its flowing silhouette and V-neckline, youâve got the key to femininity.

item.title: 2017 New York fashion week:Vivienne Tam
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: A model walks the runway at Vivienne Tam show during New York Fashion Week at Gallery 1, Skylight Clarkson Sq on September 10, 2017 in New York City.

item.title: Chinese traditional food connects with Internet in SW China
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Salt preserved eggs, a kind of traditional food of Guang'an city, is made of duck eggs boiled and steamed with dozens of condiments. Guang'an city has made the traditional food as a scaled industry by encouraging food companies to diversify their products and promoting sale on the internet.

item.title: Performers show on Chinese open house day in Brussels
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Performers show on Chinese open house day in Brussels

item.title: A day for Dhela
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Daniella Helayel made her fashion mark with her brand Issa â you may remember Kate Middleton famously wearing the founder and designer's teal-blue silk knit dress to announce her royal engagement â before selling her stake.

item.title: Chinese actress Tong Liya poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Chinese actress Tong Liya poses for fashion magazine.

item.title: Chinese actress Sun Li poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Chinese actress Sun Li poses for fashion magazine

item.title: Early autumn scenery at Baishi Mountain
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: The Baishi Mountain, which stands for the Whitestone Mountain, is named due to numerous white marbles, and the Baishi Mountain Geological National Park, located in Baoding, North China's Hebei province, is about 200 kilometers southwest of Beijing.

item.title: Wingsuit flying championship kicks off in Hunan
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Jumping off a cliff 1,458 meters above sea level is all a part of the game for those participating in this year's World Wingsuit Championship in Zhangjiajie, China.

item.title: White Collar Factory unveils London's highest rooftop running track
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Workers pose as they run round a track, unveiled as the highest running track in London, at the White Collar Factory in the 'tech belt' hub near Old Street in London, September 5, 2017.

item.title: Park scenery after rain in Yangzhou, E China's Jiangsu
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Park scenery after rain in Yangzhou, E China's Jiangsu.

item.title: Myanmar exports about 95 percent of fruits to China
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Myanmar exports about 95 percent of fruits to China

item.title: Fashion icon Liu Yifei poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Fashion icon Liu Yifei poses for the fashion magazine.

item.title: Ten teen films to welcome the new semester
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: The new semester has just arrived. Have you grown accustomed to school life after two months' rest?

item.title: 2017 Toronto Fashion Week: Lucian Matis
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: A model walks the runway at Lucian Matis show during Toronto Fashion Week at Bloor-Yorkville on September 5, 2017 in Toronto, Canada.

item.title: Chinese actress Liu Shishi poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Chinese actress Liu Shishi poses for fashion magazine.

item.title: Secrets behind the success of BRICS evening gala
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: After eight monthsâ delicate preparations, an evening gala Sail to the Future for leaders and representatives attending the 9th BRICS summit was held at the Banlam Grand Theater in Xiamen, Southeast Chinaâs Fujian Province.

item.title: Pop idol Angelababy poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Pop idol Angelababy poses for the fashion magazine.

item.title: 10 savory specialties of Xiamen
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: With the BRICS Business Forum on in coastal Xiamen, East China's Fujian province, here's a reminder of the city's signature foods that attendees will be tucking into. From fried oysters and satay noodles to wontons and local worm jelly, get ready for a mouthwatering list!

item.title: Ups and downs: Olympic champions at National Games
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Sun Yang of Zhejiang celebrates after the men's 4Ã200m freestyle final at 13th Chinese National Games in North China's Tianjin Municipality, Sept 3, 2017.

item.title: Chinese celebrities shine&nbsp;in Chinese painting style photos
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Chinese eight star have featured in a series of Chinese-style photos for the latest issue of fashion magazine Esquire.

item.title: White and red: Jolin Tsai poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Chinese pop queen Jolin Tsai poses for the latest issue of Elle magazine.

item.title: Salt fields enter into harvest season in Liaoning
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Aerial photo taken on Aug 31, 2017 shows salt fields at Fuzhouwan in Dalian, Northeast China's Liaoning province. Salt fields here entered into a harvest season now.

item.title: Hello, new semester!
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Starting from Sept 1, first grade pupils in primary schools across the country will use the same textbooks. Breaking tradition, students will first learn some Chinese characters, and later learn the Chinese phonetic alphabet.

item.title: 2017 Sao Paulo fashion week:Giuliana Romanno
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: A model walks the runway during Giuliana Romanno fashion show as part of Sao Paulo fashion week Spring/Summer 2018 on August 29, 2017 in Sao Paulo, Brazil.

item.title: Five mega-hit TV dramas in August
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: August marks a golden opportunity for the TV drama market as Chinese students enjoy their summer holiday, having more time to involve themselves in the TV plot and closely follow their favorite superstars.

item.title: Actress Dilraba Dilmurat poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Actress Dilraba Dilmurat poses for fashion magazine.

item.title: 'Gintama' to debut in China in September
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Adapted from the popular manga series of the same name, Gintama, a Japanese action-comedy film, is expected to hit the big screen in China on September 1.

item.title: 2017 Venice Film Festival opens in Italy
item.author: 中国日报-图片
item.description: Chinese director Yang Fan, member of the jury of the 74th Venice Film Festival, walks the red carpet at Venice Lido, Italy, August 30, 2017.
